mapper.select:
select cs.*, c.course_name from course_schedule cs left join course c on c.id = cs.course_id
group by cs.id, cs.semester_id, cs.course_id, cs.teacher_id, cs.laboratory_id, cs.start_week, cs.end_week, cs.weekdays, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.week_type, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, c.course_name order by cs.start_time asc

select count(*) > 0 from course_schedule cs
and cs.id = #{laboratoryId}

select cs.*, c.course_name from course_schedule cs left join course c on c.id = cs.course_id
group by cs.id, cs.semester_id, cs.course_id, cs.teacher_id, cs.laboratory_id, cs.start_week, cs.end_week, cs.weekdays, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.week_type, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, c.course_name order by cs.start_time asc
